$comment: Known-good dependency graph for andy-cli. Records the exact SDK band and Andy ecosystem package versions the CLI is verified against. Update this file in the same commit that bumps global.json or any Andy.* PackageReference in src/Andy.Cli/Andy.Cli.csproj. See docs/SDK_AND_DEPENDENCIES.md and issue #172.

sdk.policy: The build must run on a .NET 8 SDK. global.json (version 8.0.0, rollForward latestMinor) accepts the highest installed 8.0.x SDK on any host and never rolls forward to 9.x; CI and local dev verify with scripts/assert-sdk-version.sh.

sourceRevisionCompatibility.$comment: The opt-in source compatibility check uses these local defaults; the manual source-compat workflow checks out explicit revisions instead. Package versions above remain the release contract.

reproducibleRestore.policy: RestorePackagesWithLockFile is enabled on every project. Reusable validation and release builds restore with --locked-mode so the package graph is reproducible from the committed lock files.
